Running Creek Sourdough

Traditional sourdough, handcrafted for your table.

See Our Bread

The Story of Running Creek Sourdough

It all started with a simple starter and a deep respect for the slow, natural process of fermentation. At Running Creek Sourdough, we believe that true artisan bread takes time, patience, and the highest quality ingredients.

Each loaf we bake is a labor of love, crafted by hand in our home microbakery. We use traditional techniques and long fermentation periods to develop the complex flavors and airy textures that define real sourdough.

Whether it's our signature Country White or our rotating specialty loaves, every bread that leaves our oven tells a story of tradition, craft, and the simple joy of a perfect crust.

Our Artisan Loaves

Hand-scored and baked in small batches daily.

The Country Classic

Our signature white loaf with a crisp, mahogany crust and a light, airy crumb.

Rosemary & Sea Salt

Infused with fresh garden rosemary and topped with crunchy Maldon sea salt.

Toasted Walnut & Fig

A rustic, nutty loaf with the subtle sweetness of sun-dried figs.

Whole Wheat Harvest

A hearty, nutritious loaf made with freshly stone-ground whole grains.

Online Ordering Coming Soon

We're currently perfecting our online ordering system. In the meantime, you can find us at the Running Creek local market every Saturday morning.

Have a question or want to pre-order? Contact us:

hello@runningcreeksourdough.com.au
